purpose_context: Spec Kitty's terminology canon is --mission, but internal/agent commands still carry a hidden deprecated --feature alias, and five coordination.status_service symbols linger with no live callers. This mission removes that dead surface in a tightly-bounded, rebase-safe slice so subsequent missions inherit a cleaner CLI and status boundary.
purpose_tldr: Remove the dead --feature CLI alias from internal commands and retire unused status_service symbols, shrinking the codebase under epic #1797.
source_description: Epic #1797 dead-code/LOC reduction slice: #1060-A (internal-cluster --feature alias retirement) + #1622 (coordination.status_service wire-or-retire).
